plugins.name: protect-main-branch
plugins.description: Prevent direct edits and pushes to the main branch (or configured branches) in Claude Code

plugins.name: session-handover
plugins.description: Session handover and takeover skills for managing task continuity between Claude Code sessions

plugins.name: retrospective
plugins.description: Retrospective skill based on a 6-stage process (input → interpretation → planning → action → inspection → output) to surface problems and apply improvements
